submission.title: Has studio Brussel been contacted
submission.body: it started  on april 1 1983 and plays indie music

comments.body: As far as I know, it did not. If you believe the band is German and very underground, it makes little sense for Studio Brussel to know about it. However, if you think the band could be Belgian, then go ahead and ask (check with the mods first). But if even NDR doesn’t know our song, it’s unlikely that Studio Brussel will.

Studio Brussels wasn't in Darius range afaik, so I don't think it ever came up. And I agree that just contacting the station will not help. You'll need a contact that actually knows something and takes it seriously. Considering that DJs play thousands of songs the chance that they remember a single one is low though.

I know it wasn't, but people have been asking radio DJs from Canada and USA...

Studio Brussel is indeed a great radio station for indie stuff, but we would need to know who worked there back in 1983-84 and be extremely lucky they would remember an extremely underground band that played once or twice...
yes i listen it quit often i really like there program on wednesday evening with hiphop
I know you know. I was adding to your comment ;-)
If you were going to prioritise your efforts you probably wouldn't bother, though the worst that can happen is they'll say no.
Sure, I was just trying to say that it is good to find an actual knowledgeable source in the organization right away.
The song is not about waffles, chocolate, or Smurfs, nor about who *really* invented French fries. Not Belgian.
I'm the end it's gonna turn out that the band was from Luxembourg 😁

I have often wondered if they were Belgian, but I doubt it. There was a big new wave/cold wave scene (Neon Judgement, Snowy Red, KK records, etc..) but none of them had this 'guitar heavy' sound.

That said, I highly doubt anyone at Studio Brussels nowadays worked there back than. Most have retired or moved on to other radiostations.

>active in genzdong, anti-work

Jokes write themselves

Cry about what ? About the fact that communism will never be established ? How millions of Chinese died due to Mao's stupid policies ? Or how they become the backbone of capitalism ?

There wont be any "revolution". You know that too but continue to deny and jack off to the dreams of having free stuff.
What should I say again, i forgor 💀
Youre walking on thin ice there buddy
Thank you comrade for your service
Gotta love Nazi propaganda that make us look cool asf.
That post had me laughing out loud! Great job finding such a hilarious share. Made my day brighter.
